abort.already_configured: This bwa Wi-Fi Module is already configured

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to this bwa Wi-Fi Module, please try again

data.sync_time: Keep your Balboa BP controller's time synchronized with Home Assistant
data.keepalive_enabled: Enable keep-alive (usually not needed, the spa already pushes status updates on its own)
data.keepalive_frame_type: Keep-alive frame type: "existing_client_request" (default, gets a real reply from the WiFi module) or "minimal" (silent frame, no reply)
